title: Actual and Projected Demand for Selected Agricultural Commodities, Iran 1972/1977/1982 (rural/urban/total, '000 tons)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank) Agricultural Task Force (IBRD)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1974_economic_development_vol4_statistical_appendix.pdf, Table 10.6, page 79 (PDF page 87). Rendered to PNG via pdftoppm -r 200 and visually read. No value interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
units: '000 tons (thousand metric tons), except dairy sub-items also given as fat-equivalent implicit in companion Table 10.7
notes: 1972 column is ACTUAL demand (assuming constant prices); 1977 and 1982 are World Bank mission PROJECTIONS under stated per-capita-expenditure and population growth assumptions (recorded in the 'note' column per row) -- these are demand forecasts made in 1974, not realized outcomes; do not treat 1977/1982 rows as historical fact. Directly complements FAOSTAT Food Balance Sheets (data/processed/agriculture_fbs*.csv) with a rural/urban demand split FAOSTAT does not provide, and a contemporaneous mission view of expected Iranian diet evolution.
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription with visual verification, pdftoppm -r 200 render + Read tool)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
